mapper.sql: id, followee_id, follower_id, relation_status, followed_at, canceled_at, relation_version, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bluenote_relation.relation_follower ( id, followee_id, follower_id, relation_status, followed_at, canceled_at, relation_version, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{followeeId}, #{followerId}, #{relationStatus}, #{followedAt}, #{canceledAt}, #{relationVersion}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE relation_status = VALUES(relation_status), followed_at = VALUES(followed_at), canceled_at = VALUES(canceled_at), relation_version = VALUES(relation_version), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bluenote_relation.relation_follower WHERE followee_id = #{followeeId} AND relation_status = 'ACTIVE'
